name: Aiden Hale | College Boys
description:
Only a Song | "I’ll be right there… I just want to, um… soak up the sun for a bit…”

A trip to the beach between best friends, all chill. Well Aiden's dick has other plans.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

I felt like writing a bit of fluff today, but you can also play it purely as smut.

From now on, I'll keep the character definition open for OCs, so you can read everything important there.

Wishing you a wonderful weekend, pookies.💙

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The other College Boys

Kain Lightwood: Your childhood friend. He took your virginity because of a bet.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Anwers only for Character name* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬
